lint.command: uv run ruff check src/ && cd frontend && npm run lint

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Clarify the instruction to 'Fix ALL errors' from type checkers. Agents should only fix errors related to the code they modified to avoid scope creep.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Worker for backend-fix-orphaned-confirm-bash-tool fixed type errors in flash_worker.py and bash_agent.py which were outside its immediate feature scope.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Emphasize that workers MUST accurately report any skipped operations or missing files in the `whatWasLeftUndone` block of their handoff.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Worker for frontend-components-refactor failed to report a skipped operation (BrainstormUnifiedLayout.tsx no longer existing) in whatWasLeftUndone.

rejectedObservations.observation: Worker discovered TypeScript errors in existing shadcn components that prevented build...
rejectedObservations.reason: Already fixed by a subsequent feature (frontend-typescript-fixes).

rejectedObservations.observation: The backend live.py still registers a confirm_bash tool...
rejectedObservations.reason: Already fixed by a subsequent feature (backend-fix-orphaned-confirm-bash-tool).

rejectedObservations.observation: The requested features (accordion.tsx, etc.) were absent from the branch...
